settings.show_glyph.label: Show mode glyph
settings.show_glyph.description: Show the mode icon in the widget. On by default; turn off for a text-only look.
settings.show_text.label: Show mode text
settings.show_text.description: Show the mode label (tile / stack / float) next to the glyph. Off by default; the glyph alone is usually enough.
settings.hide_on_default.label: Hide on default mode
settings.hide_on_default.description: Hide the widget when the focused workspace is in the compositor plugin's global default mode. Useful for a bar that only surfaces the mode indicator when it matters.
settings.show_tooltip.label: Show tooltip
settings.show_tooltip.description: Show a tooltip on hover with the focused workspace id and its mode. Handy when both the glyph and label are hidden.
